titles.title: I Got the Holy Ghost Down in My Soul

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v1 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I got the Holy Ghost…down in my soul…just like the Bible says… I got the Holy Ghost…down in my soul…just like the Bible says I got the Holy Ghost… down in my soul…just like the Bible says…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’ve been to the river and I’ve been baptized… My soul got happy, and I’m satisfied… I’ve got my hand on the gospel plow… And I wouldn’t take nothing for my journey now Just like the Bible…Just like the Bible…Just Like the Bible says

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Just like the Bible…Just like the Bible…Just Like the Bible says
